intent.summary: Reduce popup UI density and make History (filters/results/details/data management) easier and safer to use.
intent.whyNow: Local-first features (History, filters, export, schema pinning, lifecycle controls) increased cognitive load and risk of misclicks; the UI needed clearer hierarchy and safer destructive actions.

decisions.title: History information architecture
decisions.decision: Re-structure into four sections with progressive disclosure for advanced filters.
decisions.rationale: Matches user task flow (filter → select → export) and isolates destructive actions.
risks: Playwright selectors may break if anchored on text; mitigate with data-testid

decisions.title: Destructive action confirmation
decisions.decision: Two-step confirm inside popup with 10s auto-expire.
decisions.rationale: More reliable in automation and reduces accidental destructive clicks without relying on browser dialogs.

decisions.title: Bulk export of current results
decisions.decision: Add bulk JSON and merged TSV/CSV exports for current Results.
decisions.rationale: Avoids repetitive per-page downloads; keeps exports local-first and deterministic within current filter scope.

evidence.notes: Playwright E2E updated to use data-testid and download.saveAs for stability.

followUps: Optional: add ZIP export for per-extraction files if users want separate outputs
Optional: improve status message placement (inline near actions) for even clearer feedback
